name: Pressure Bomb (Major)
description:
Activate 1 Strike

This tightly sealed metal container is filled with highly pressurized gas that can explode to release a powerful shockwave. A pressure bomb deals ] damage and )[bludgeoning]]{4 bludgeoning splash damage}. On a critical hit, the target is knocked .

Medium or smaller creatures who take splash damage are pushed 5 feet away from the target, and then, if the target is Large or smaller, it is pushed 5 feet away from you.

You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.
